sidebar.title: Navigation Menu
sidebar.description: Here you'll find all system sections. Click on items to navigate between pages.

navDashboard.title: Dashboard
navDashboard.description: Access the main panel with an overview of vulnerability statistics and charts.

navCveSearch.title: CVE Search
navCveSearch.description: Access the advanced search tool to find and filter specific vulnerabilities.

search.title: Quick Search
search.description: Use search to quickly find what you're looking for. Shortcut: ⌘K or Ctrl+K

themeToggle.title: Light/Dark Mode
themeToggle.description: Toggle between light and dark mode according to your preference.

statsCards.title: Statistics Cards
statsCards.description: View your business's key metrics quickly and intuitively.

charts.title: Interactive Charts
charts.description: Analyze your data through interactive charts. Hover to see details.

language.title: Language
language.description: Change the interface language between Portuguese and English.

themeSelector.title: Theme Selector
themeSelector.description: Customize the system appearance by choosing from different color themes.

cveSearch.title: CVE Search
cveSearch.description: Search for vulnerabilities by CVE ID, vendor, product, or keywords in the description.

cveFilters.title: Advanced Filters
cveFilters.description: Refine your search using severity, CVSS score, CWE, programming language filters and more.

cveStats.title: Search Statistics
cveStats.description: View result metrics: total CVEs, linked repositories, available exploits and fixes.

cveResults.title: Search Results
cveResults.description: List of found CVEs. Click a row to see full details. Use headers to sort.

cveDetails.title: CVE Details
cveDetails.description: See complete information: CVSS scores, CWEs, affected products, repositories, exploits and fix commits.

cveCopyLink.title: Share CVE
cveCopyLink.description: Copy the direct link to this CVE and share it with your team.
